sairConfirm.descricao: You'll return to the sign-in screen.

header.subtitulo: Find the right job and apply in minutes.

candidaturas.subtitulo: Track the progress of the jobs you've applied to.
candidaturas.andamentoEmBreve: Detailed progress tracking is coming soon.

desistirConfirm.descricao: You'll leave this hiring process. This can't be undone.

candidaturas.aprovadoMsg: Congratulations! You were approved and received an offer by email.
candidaturas.reprovadoMsg: We're sorry! Unfortunately the process ended at the stage: {{fase}}.

feedback.subtitulo: Analysis of your hiring process for {{cargo}}.

aprovado.resumo: Your performance was consistent across all stages. The clarity of your answers and your fit with the role were decisive for the approval.
fortes: Clear and objective communication throughout the interviews.
Technical experience well aligned with the role's requirements.
Strong demonstration of collaboration and teamwork.
desenvolver: Reinforce examples with quantifiable metrics and results.
Explore the business context behind your technical decisions further.

reprovado.resumo: Your process ended at the {{fase}} stage. You showed solid strengths, but some aspects weighed in the comparison with other candidates.
fortes: Solid technical grounding in the initial answers.
Clear motivation and genuine interest in the role.
desenvolver: Structure answers with concrete examples (STAR method).
Deepen the specific knowledge required by the role.
Back up results with objective data and metrics.

vazio.descricao: Explore open positions and apply in minutes.

finalizadas.subtitulo: Hiring processes already concluded — approved or closed.

vazio.descricao: Once a process is concluded, it shows up here.
Try adjusting your search or clearing the filters.
